---
description: 'Guidelines for handling dependency management in Maven projects'
applyTo: '**/pom.xml'
---

# Maven

## Deprecated dependencies

The following dependencies are deprecated and should not be used.
As a general rule, you should always use the latest version of any dependency.

| Deprecated dependency | Use instead                                           |
|-----------------------|-------------------------------------------------------|
| `org.springframework.boot:spring-boot-starter-web` | `org.springframework.boot:spring-boot-starter-webmvc` |
